terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.introSuffix: is a private and restricted application developed to manage shared lists among family members and close friends. By using this platform, you agree to the conditions described in this document.
terms.s1p1: Anyone can create a titular account on {{appName}}. Upon registration, the user becomes the titular of their own family and can invite members via invite links.
terms.s1p2: The platform is for personal and family use, is not publicly advertised, and does not constitute a commercial service. Use is permitted only for lawful and personal purposes, in accordance with applicable Brazilian laws.
terms.s1p3suffix: (children, spouses, friends, etc.) join via an invite link generated by the family titular — creating a titular account is not required to join an existing family.
terms.s1p4: Using the platform for commercial purposes, reselling access, or any activity that violates third-party rights is prohibited.
terms.s2li1: Keeping your login credentials (email and password) confidential;
terms.s2li2: All activity carried out with your account;
terms.s2li3: The content of lists and items you create or edit;
terms.s2li4: Immediately notifying the administrator of any unauthorized use of your account.
terms.s2outro: The administrator reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, without prior notice.
terms.s3p1: {{appName}} is a personal project and there is no guarantee of continuous service availability. The platform may be interrupted, altered, or shut down at any time by the administrator, without obligation of prior notice.
terms.s3p2: We are not responsible for any downtime, data loss, or interruptions caused by maintenance, technical failures, or administrative decisions.
terms.s3p3: We recommend that critical data not be stored exclusively on this platform.
terms.s4intro: By using {{appName}}, you agree not to:
terms.s4li1: Post illegal, offensive, defamatory content, or content that violates third-party rights;
terms.s4li2: Attempt to access other users' data without authorization;
terms.s4li3: Reverse engineer, scrape, or technically exploit the system in any way;
terms.s4li4: Share login credentials with unauthorized third parties.
terms.s5p1post: , without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including warranties of fitness for a particular purpose.
terms.s5p2: Under no circumstances shall the administrator be liable for direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the platform.
terms.s6p1: These Terms of Use may be changed at any time. Significant changes will be communicated by email or through the platform itself. Continued use of the service after changes implies acceptance of the new terms.
terms.s6p2: The updated version will always be available on this page, indicating the date of the last update.
terms.s7p1: Questions about these Terms of Use can be sent to:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introPre: Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy describes how
privacy.introMid: collects, uses and protects your personal data, in compliance with the
privacy.lgpdName: Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados (LGPD — Law no. 13.709/2018)
privacy.s1intro: We collect only the data strictly necessary for the platform to function:
privacy.s1t2desc: Optional — only if you provide it
privacy.s1outro: We do not collect location data, tracking cookies, or any information beyond what is necessary for the service to function.
privacy.s2intro: Your data is used exclusively to:
privacy.s2li1: Authenticate and identify you on the platform;
privacy.s2li2: Display your name and photo in the family groups you belong to;
privacy.s2li3: Store and sync lists and items among family members;
privacy.s2li4: Send transactional emails (such as password resets) via Firebase.
privacy.s2noBold: We do not use your data for commercial, marketing, or advertising purposes.
privacy.s2noSuffix: We do not share your data with third parties, except for the technical infrastructure described below.
privacy.s3p1post: (Firebase Authentication and Firestore Database) for authentication and data storage.
privacy.s3p2pre: Data may be stored on Google servers located in the United States or other regions, as per Firebase platform policies. Google is a signatory of the
privacy.s3p2post: and provides adequate safeguards for international data transfers.
privacy.s3p3post: for more details on how Google handles data.
privacy.s4intro: We adopt the following security measures:
privacy.s4li1: Secure authentication via Firebase Auth with hashed passwords;
privacy.s4li2: Firestore security rules that ensure access only to one's own data;
privacy.s4li3: Encrypted communication via HTTPS/TLS on all accesses;
privacy.s4li4: Administrative access restricted to a single authenticated master user.
privacy.s4outro: Despite the measures in place, no system is 100% secure. In the event of a security incident affecting your data, you will be notified as soon as possible.
privacy.s5intro: Under the Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados (LGPD), you have the following rights:
privacy.s5r0desc: Request confirmation and access to the data we hold about you
privacy.s5r1desc: Request correction of incomplete, inaccurate, or outdated data
privacy.s5r2desc: Request deletion of your personal data (except where retention is required by law)
privacy.s5r3desc: Request your data in a structured, machine-readable format
privacy.s5r4desc: Revoke consent given at any time
privacy.s5outro: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at the email below. We will respond within 15 business days.
privacy.s6p1: Your data is kept while your account is active. If you request account deletion, your personal data will be removed within 30 days, except data that must be retained by legal obligation.
privacy.s6p2: Shared list and item content may be retained for other family members until the group titular requests complete deletion.
privacy.s6p3pre: To request deletion of your account and data, send an email to
privacy.s7p1: The person responsible for processing personal data on {{appName}} is Pedro Bolson.
privacy.s7p2: For questions, requests, or complaints related to privacy and data protection, contact us:
privacy.s7anpdPre: If you do not receive a satisfactory response, you have the right to contact the
privacy.s7anpdName: Autoridade Nacional de Proteção de Dados (ANPD)
